data.body: B3 (core-farce-seed) CLOSED with completion-verifier PASS, signed at HEAD 3a7a5cc2. Delivered: gates/completion-verification.yaml (v3 workflow: precheck -> branch[verify->reconcile | passthrough]), gate_ops.py (3 uses ops adapting completion.py), 4 op schemas, ADR 0003 (workflow-as-gate pattern), 8 offline tests (short-circuit/parity/reconcile-invariants/citation-downgrade). Full gated workflow honored: plan-review PASS+9 advisories triaged -> claim -> implement -> code-review subagent (caught a summary exclude_none cutover-breaker, fixed) -> full suite 3321 passed -> completion-verify close (caught missing AC4c citation-downgrade test, added). Commits on feat/gate-workflow-migration: a109eef6, 08ff2767, 3a7a5cc2. Deferred parity gaps recorded on B4 (summary-carrying, epic-graph target, fake-runner) and B5 (verdict buried in branch arm -> RunResult extraction). Next unblocked story: B1 knotty-hat-chase (production batch-runner from sizing.py). Branch not yet PR'd to main.
